text.title: pnpm Package Management Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema for the config artefact this methodology produces. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints + forbidden patterns.

example.code: { "package_manager": "pnpm@9.1.0", "npmrc_shamefully_hoist": false, "npmrc_strict_peer_dependencies": true, "npmrc_engine_strict": true, "ci_frozen_lockfile": true, "preinstall_only_allow": true, "workspace_packages": [ "apps/*", "packages/*" ], "lockfile_committed": true }

example.note: package_manager missing semver pin; shamefully-hoist=true defeats isolation; CI runs without --frozen-lockfile; missing preinstall + lockfile_committed.

pattern.why: Mixed package managers corrupt installs and break reproducibility.

pattern.description: packageManager field missing or pinned to a non-semver tag
pattern.why: Violates pin-package-manager; corepack cannot enforce version.
